title: potentilla pedata var. laciniosa
intro: Potentilla pedata var. laciniosa, also known as the five-pointed cinquefoil, is a variety of the Potentilla pedata plant, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Potentilla pedata var. laciniosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin issues and digestive problems.
